1.0.0.en: Initial release with a flow for checking door status

1.0.1.en: Fix a bug where it did not detect the door open state correctly

1.2.1.en: Reuse cached door API code for faster door action response time in some cases

1.2.2.en: Update app image. Add source link.

1.3.0.en: Add support for ismartgate MINI and LITE. Add flow for sensor temperature comparison.

1.4.0.en: Add battery level flow. Add donation button. Add setup instructions.

1.5.0.en: Add garage door device with open/close toggle, temperature and battery sensors. Doors now appear as devices in Homey. Add flow triggers for when door opens or closes.

1.5.1.en: Fix auth errors being reported as generic network errors. Add validation for flow card hub and door number arguments. Improve polling loop stability.

1.6.0.en: Flow action and condition cards now use a device picker instead of manual hub and door number inputs, making flows easier to set up.

1.6.1.en: Fix app installation error caused by invalid placeholders in flow card titles.

1.7.0.en: Add Norwegian translations for flow cards. Fix door toggle reverting to wrong state on failure. Add test connection button in settings.
